pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"julia-二进制安装程序","children":"Julia 二进制安装程序"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Julia 是一个全新的以科学计算为核心的通用编程语言，其二进制程序可以到如下链接下载。"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["这里仅镜像 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://julialang.org/downloads/","rel":"nofollow","children":"JuliaLang Downloads"}]," 中提供的稳定发行版以及 rc 版本。每日构建的测试版 (nightlies) 不包括在内。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["尽管一些包管理工具（例如 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"apt"}],", ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"pacman"}],", ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"conda"}],", ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"choco"}],") 中提供有 Julia，但是这些工具或多或少都存在一些由二进制 依赖导致的问题，因此官方推荐的方式是根据自己的使用平台下载相应的二进制程序，然后通过解压的方式进行手动安装。"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"juliaup-使用说明","children":"juliaup 使用说明"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":[["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/juliaup","rel":"nofollow","children":"juliaup"}]," 是现在 Julia 社区默认推荐的安装方式，通过设置环境变量 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"JULIAUP_SERVER"}]," 的地址为 ",["$r","CodeInline",null,{"codeLanguage":true,"templateId":"template-1"}]," 后，即可正常使用镜像站来下载 Julia 程序。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"以下是 juliaup 官方的标准安装方式："}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Windows:"}],"
",["$r","SyntaxHighlight",null,{"code":"winget install --name Julia --id 9NJNWW8PVKMN -e -s msstore","language":"powershell"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Mac, Linux, and FreeBSD:"}],"
",["$r","SyntaxHighlight",null,{"code":"curl -fsSL https://install.julialang.org | sh","language":"shell"}]]}]
